rationale: r0c2's SoC (31%) is below your share threshold (50%), but your own SoC (38%) is also critically close to that threshold; offer 0.15 kWh (matching sustained minimal-sharing rate) rather than full 0.5 kWh to preserve your 50% buffer and maintain 3–4 h autonomy.

user:
